ae2helpers.redstonelink.tooltip.hint: Sneak-right-click a pattern provider to link, then put this in an import bus
ae2helpers.redstonecard.pattern: Emits a redstone signal while one of this provider's patterns is being crafted
ae2helpers.redstonecard.screen.title: Redstone Card Configuration
ae2helpers.redstonecard.mode.tooltip:
While Crafting: signal on while crafting.
Inverted: signal on while NOT crafting.
Pulse: short pulse when a craft starts and when it finishes.
ae2helpers.redstonecard.pulse.tooltip: How long each pulse lasts, in ticks (20 ticks = 1s). Only used in Pulse mode.
ae2helpers.redstonecard.strong.tooltip:
If enabled, emits a strong signal (powers through solid blocks).
If disabled, a weak signal (powers adjacent components only).
ae2helpers.redstonecard.side.tooltip:
Which face of the block emits the signal.
'All Sides' emits from every face. Ignored for the cable part (always emits from its attached side).
ae2helpers.configuration.title: ae2helpers Configs
ae2helpers.crafthelper.title: Auto-Import Pending Crafts
ae2helpers.crafthelper.tooltip: [AE2Helpers] Auto moves items that are auto-crafted via the recipe viewer to the crafting grid
ae2helpers.importcard.screen.title: Import Card Configuration
ae2helpers.importcard.resultsonly.toolti:
If enabled, only imports items that are expected outputs of the current crafting pattern.
If disabled, imports everything from the target machine.
ae2helpers.importcard.sync.tooltip:
If enabled, constantly checks if the Crafting CPU still wants the items.
Stops importing if the job is cancelled or fulfilled by other means.
Only works if `Import Crafting Results Only` is enabled
ae2helpers.importcard.direction.tooltip:
The side of the adjacent machine to pull items from.
'Auto' uses the side facing the Pattern Provider.
